rawAssistant: Moonlight casts an eerie glow on the well's surface as I peer into its depths. The mist that shrouded Hollowfen overnight is lifting now, revealing faint signs of disturbance on the side road – a traveler might find it wise to take a closer look at these markings before proceeding northward.
